## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 507 articles to be published by Saturday, including new AI agent architect persona editorials](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Strong performance: Near all-time high impressions, massive rise in AI overviews on Google, high LLM referrals (88 sessions, mainly ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
